description: Update all documentation references from the old skipConfirmation/OPENTABS_SKIP_CONFIRMATION naming to the current skipPermissions/OPENTABS_SKIP_PERMISSIONS naming, and add the missing --dangerously-skip-permissions flag to the CLI reference.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Rename skipConfirmation to skipPermissions in configuration reference
userStories.description: As a user reading the configuration docs, I want the documented config field name, environment variable, and CLI flag to match the actual source code so that my configuration works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx: the config field table row shows `skipPermissions` instead of `skipConfirmation`
docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx: the section heading reads `### skipPermissions` instead of `### skipConfirmation`
docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx: the body text references `OPENTABS_SKIP_PERMISSIONS` as the primary env var name (may mention `OPENTABS_SKIP_CONFIRMATION` as a legacy alias)
docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx: the body text references `--dangerously-skip-permissions` as the CLI flag name
docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx: the incorrect claim that the flag is 'not the opentabs CLI' is removed â€” the flag IS available on `opentabs start`
docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx: the environment variables table row shows `OPENTABS_SKIP_PERMISSIONS` as the primary name
lastUpdated frontmatter is updated to 2026-03-02
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
The MCP server config field was renamed from `skipConfirmation` to `skipPermissions` (see platform/mcp-server/src/config.ts). The source code maintains backward compatibility: it reads `skipPermissions` first and falls back to `skipConfirmation`. Similarly, the env var was renamed from OPENTABS_SKIP_CONFIRMATION to OPENTABS_SKIP_PERMISSIONS (both still accepted in platform/mcp-server/src/skip-permissions.ts). The CLI flag was renamed from --dangerously-skip-confirmation to --dangerously-skip-permissions (see platform/cli/src/commands/start.ts line 450).

In docs/content/docs/reference/configuration.mdx, update these locations:
- Line 58: `skipConfirmation` â†’ `skipPermissions` in the config fields table
- Line 237: `### skipConfirmation` â†’ `### skipPermissions`
- Line 243: Update the entire paragraph. Replace `OPENTABS_SKIP_CONFIRMATION` with `OPENTABS_SKIP_PERMISSIONS`, replace `--dangerously-skip-confirmation` with `--dangerously-skip-permissions`, and remove the incorrect claim '(not the `opentabs` CLI)' â€” the flag IS on the opentabs CLI (`opentabs start --dangerously-skip-permissions`). You may mention the old names as legacy aliases.
- Line 286: env var table: `OPENTABS_SKIP_CONFIRMATION` â†’ `OPENTABS_SKIP_PERMISSIONS`
- Line 288: update the description text to reference the new names

Do NOT change the behavior description â€” just update the names. The backward compatibility (old names still accepted) can be mentioned as a note.

userStories.title: Update skipConfirmation references in MCP server and architecture docs
userStories.description: As a contributor reading the architecture docs, I want the permission bypass config field to use its current name so that the docs match the source code.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/reference/mcp-server.mdx line 206: `skipConfirmation` is replaced with `skipPermissions` and `OPENTABS_SKIP_CONFIRMATION` is replaced with `OPENTABS_SKIP_PERMISSIONS`
docs/content/docs/contributing/architecture.mdx line 443: `skipConfirmation` is replaced with `skipPermissions`
lastUpdated frontmatter is updated to 2026-03-02 on both pages
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Two more pages reference the old `skipConfirmation` name:

1. docs/content/docs/reference/mcp-server.mdx line 206:
   Current: '`confirmationBypassed` â€” whether the confirmation prompt system is skipped (via `skipConfirmation` config or `OPENTABS_SKIP_CONFIRMATION` env var)'
   Change to: '`confirmationBypassed` â€” whether the confirmation prompt system is skipped (via `skipPermissions` config or `OPENTABS_SKIP_PERMISSIONS` env var)'
   Note: the health endpoint response field is still called `confirmationBypassed` in the source code â€” do NOT rename that field, only update the parenthetical explanation.

2. docs/content/docs/contributing/architecture.mdx line 443:
   Current: 'The `skipConfirmation` config flag bypasses the entire evaluation'
   Change to: 'The `skipPermissions` config flag bypasses the entire evaluation'

Update lastUpdated to 2026-03-02 on both pages.

userStories.title: Add --dangerously-skip-permissions flag to CLI reference for opentabs start
userStories.description: As a user reading the CLI reference, I want to see all available flags for `opentabs start` so that I can discover the permission bypass option.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/reference/cli.mdx: the `opentabs start` options table includes a row for `--dangerously-skip-permissions` with description explaining it bypasses all browser tool confirmation dialogs
The description includes a warning that sensitive operations execute without human approval
lastUpdated frontmatter is updated to 2026-03-02
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
The `opentabs start` command has a `--dangerously-skip-permissions` flag (see platform/cli/src/commands/start.ts lines 449-452) that is not documented in the CLI reference.

In docs/content/docs/reference/cli.mdx, find the `opentabs start` options table (around lines 54-72). It currently has rows for `--port`, `--background`, and `--show-config`. Add a new row after `--show-config`:

| `--dangerously-skip-permissions` | â€” | Bypass all browser tool confirmation dialogs. **WARNING:** sensitive operations (cookies, storage, script execution) will execute without human approval. For CI and testing environments only. |

Follow the existing Table.Row / Table.Cell MDX pattern used by the other rows in the table. The Default column should be `â€”` (em-dash).
